events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes an air separator installed in the wrong location in a boiler & pump piping system. This is a non-compliant condition since air separators need to be installed in specific locations (typically at the point of lowest pressure/highest temperature, usually right after the boiler on the supply side) per manufacturer requirements and hydronics best practices.

Key findings:
- Air separator in wrong location = non-compliant
- Work is rough-complete stage
- This affects system performance (air removal efficiency)
- Risk is medium - not immediately dangerous but will cause operational issues

Decision: fail (non-compliant)
Risk: medium
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
